examples: Last year the millionth truck rolled off the assembly line.
Extracting information about the large-scale composition of a planet from a sample weighing a millionth of a gram was a fascinating example of scientific endeavour.
It ain't a millionth part of it!
The firm recently celebrated its seven millionth car rolling off its production line on Wearside.
No one is even 2 to the 300 millionth times smarter than a squirrel.
